## Functional change overview

| Area                                  | Change                                                                                                                                  | Formula changed? | Effect                                                                                      |
| ------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------: | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Penman / latent heat**              | Vapour-pressure deficit is now converted from hPa to kPa; aerodynamic resistance is checked elementwise; invalid cases return `NA`.     |          **Yes** | Penman values may change substantially; this is the main unit-level fix.                    |
| **Bowen**                             | Shared beta/denominator handling for sensible and latent Bowen paths; non-finite and near-singular cases are guarded.                   |               No | Fewer uncontrolled `NaN`/`Inf` cases; capped cases are not interpreted as exact closure.    |
| **Bulk-Residual**                     | Added `sensible_bulk()`, `latent_bulk_residual()` and `turb_flux_bulk_residual()` with optional Richardson guard.                       |       New method | Bulk-Residual is now a regular package workflow; default remains neutral/unguarded.         |
| **Monin-Obukhov/Profile**             | Corrected `sensible_monin()` denominator from `log(z2 - z1)` to `z2 - z1`; invalid profile states return `NA`; zero gradients return 0. |          **Yes** | MO/Profile outputs may change; the method remains profile-based and not balance-normalized. |
| **Priestley-Taylor**                  | Formula unchanged; warning logic and documentation improved.                                                                            |               No | Stable entry method remains unchanged.                                                      |
| **Radiation / Solar / Transmittance** | Improved POSIXct/POSIXlt handling; invalid solar elevation in relative air mass returns `NA`.                                           |               No | Radiation/transmittance paths are more robust.                                              |
| **Soil**                              | Invalid soil-depth pairs are guarded; `soil_attenuation()` now calls `soil_thermal_cond(texture, moisture)` correctly.                  |           Partly | Valid soil heat flux remains unchanged; one argument-order bug was corrected.               |
| **Humidity / helpers**                | `hum_precipitable_water()` now handles POSIXct safely.                                                                                  |               No | `rad_sw_in()` → `trans_vapor()` no longer fails through the precipitable-water path.        |
| **weather_station / wrappers**        | `turb_flux_calc()` now includes Bulk-Residual, adds `pt_only`, and catches Penman failures as `NA`.                                     |    Wrapper logic | The combined workflow is broader and more robust.                                           |
| **R documentation**                   | Roxygen updated for formulas, units, signs, guards, examples and open validation items.                                                 |               No | Reference pages are clearer and more explicit.                                              |

Main output-changing fixes: Penman hPa→kPa scaling, Monin `z2 - z1` denominator, Bowen guarded denominator/cap behavior, optional Bulk `ri_guard`, corrected soil attenuation argument order, and broader `turb_flux_calc()` output.
